changeSet.author: sumicare
sumicare
changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO beds (room_id, bed_label, is_active) SELECT r.id, b.label, true FROM rooms r CROSS JOIN (VALUES ('1'),('2')) AS b(label) WHERE r.organization_id = (SELECT id FROM organizations WHERE slug='lasema') AND r.room_number IN ('Private 2','Private 3','Private 4','Private 5') AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM beds bd WHERE bd.room_id = r.id AND bd.bed_label = b.label);
